race.comment: SNACK BAR (13) no excuses today fourth up with the stable rider engaged. Loomed ominously out wide before knocking up late with a tidy third over 1200m here. Will relish the fast tempo from the low draw and can score a long overdue win. COLUMBIA BLUE (12) talented gelding building a solid winning CV. Kept coming from the outside draw first-up with a narrow second to Polyglot over 1100m at this track. Undefeated second-up and has the upside to overcome the wide gate. READY TO SHINE (2) durable gelding who speared to the front with a surprise victory over this track and distance last start. Has more to offer and can carry the extra weight. Each-way. SILENCIO PORFAVOR (16) produced solid figures when demolishing his rivals over 1200m at Newcastle. Jumps a few grades today and keep safe with Lloyd aboard. SHROPSHIRE LAD (9) is racing well and don't let him slip under the guard at the each way odds.
